title: SRO 62 DATED 18 MAR 1997
text: MINISTRY OF DEFENCE New Delhi, the 18th March, 1997 S.R.O. 62. - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and clauses (b) and (c) of sub-section (2) of Section 123 of the Coast Guard Act, 1978 (30 of 1978), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, to amend the Coast Guard (General) Rules, 1986, namely:- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Coast Guard (Condition of Service) Amendment Rules, 1997. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Coast Guard (Condition of Service) Rules, 1986, of Rule 4, sub-rule(1), the following provision shall be inserted at the end, namely- “provided that the appointment of transfer of the officers of the rank of Deputy Inspector General, Inspector General and equivalent posts, shall be made by the Director General with the prior approval of the Central Government”. [F. No. 6(6)/92/DO.I/D(N-II) K.J. JAIPRAKASH Desk Officer FOOT NOTE: The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number SRO 20(E) dated 12 Nov 1986. -- 1 of 1 --
